title: 《伊瑟》2024.10.24原质测试招募开启！
summary: 《伊瑟》「原质测试」定档，招募开启！关注+预约《伊瑟》并在下方留言，我们将在10月22日12:00抽取100位超链者送出【原质测试资格】！※抽奖将以实物抽奖的方式进行，获奖的超链者无需填写收件地址📶测试信息▶测试时间：10月24日11:00—11月4日11:00▶测试平台：iOS、安卓、PC三平台

ally等精美奖品！","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"▶资格发放：若您获得测试资格，可在TapTap【个人中心-右上角消息按钮-通知】中收到通知","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"※登录填写问卷的TapTap账号需和本次测试账号一致","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"📶","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"测试须知","color":"var(--gray-08)","fontSize":"","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"1、本次测试中所体验的内容均为开发中版本，不代表游戏上线的最终品质。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"2、招募问卷一经提交则无法修改，还请超链者们确认填写的信息真实无误。\n\n","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]
